ItacAcademyItem.Name: Informi-Bologna (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Apollo standing with rays around his head, his right hand holding the plectrum, his left pointing at one of the two seated statues below, at the right an unformed figure, at the left a nude woman
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The Informi Academy flourished at the same time as the Indistinti Academy and the Velati Academy, but there is no document related to these two groups. Publications related to the Informi Academy, and not in British Library collections, are: Latina Hetruscaque carmina in laudem adm. R. patris magistri Timothei Riccii Florentini ... D. Ioanni Baptistae Strotio ... donata, dicata, sacrataque ab Academicis Informis huiusmodi carmina colligentibus (Bononiae: typis Francisci Catanij, 1631) - which contains the Academy emblem and motto - Gli Accademici Informi per la solennita di Santa Maria Maddalena loro protettrice. Al reverendissimo p. d. Protasio Borzani dignissimo abbate in S. Procolo di Bologna (In Bologna: per Giacomo Monti, 1652); Per la solennita di S.M. Maddalena protettrice de gli Accademici Informi, da loro celebrata nella chiesa de` RR. PP. Teatini di Bologna. Alla sereniss. altezza di madama Maria l`infanta di Savoia (In Bologna: per Giacomo Monti, 1654).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
